name: Applesauce Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the flour, sugar, baking soda, pecans, egg, applesauce, vegetable oil, and cinnamon in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased loaf pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
